title: Bug Splat

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText2: an image of a fly or bug on the switch (optional)

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The goal is to find other body parts that can be used to activate a switch.
2. Move the switch around while making a buzzing "fly" sound.
3. Bring it near a body part (head, hand, foot) and prompt the switch user to "splat" it!

tooltipText: This silly game helps find a second body part to activate a switch.
